title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 128.454
text:
*128.454.  Fourth congressional district (2010 census) — The fourth congressional district shall be composed of the following:
(L. 2011 H.B. 193) 
*Effective 6-03-11, see § 21.250.  H.B. 193 was vetoed on April 30, 2011.  The veto was overridden on May 4, 2011.
